name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Hi again, Peter. We're just hours away from our first campaign finance deadline, so I wanted to send you a quick update and make one last ask of you before midnight.
We are extraordinarily close to hitting our deadline goal. So close that, if you make your first online donation right now, you could be the one to put us over the top. Can you use this link to make a $3 donation before midnight?
**[go.ZephyrForNY.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ea5/6e822e2f/1ba87dc1/41727592/3876513720/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTItMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180712-3-full")**
I'm so grateful to everyone who has chipped in toward our deadline goal already. It was an ambitious goal, and at times, I honestly wasn't sure if we'd make it. But with your help, I think we will.
We're closing the book on this deadline in a few hours, and the number of individual donations we report afterward is going to send a powerful message about the depth of our grassroots support. So thank you in advance.
Best,
Zephyr

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ea5/6e822e2f/1ba87dc1/41727593/3876513720/VEsE/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ea5/6e822e2f/1ba87dc1/41727594/3876513720/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Senate Update 2018
subject: Barletta isn't looking out for you, so we need to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6166/51dbcc2a/1a72b1c2/3a79c6c/1737561720/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

Congressman Lou Barletta never misses an opportunity to bow to corporate special interests. He sides with the president's agenda 99% of the time, has supported countless attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act and voted for the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, which has already hurt middle-class families here in Pennsylvania.

**_[Pennsylvania deserves a Senator who puts Pennsylvanians first. Can you donate $5 today to help re-elect Bob?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180712_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Ever since Bob took a stand against the president's decision to outsource Supreme Court selection to corporate special interests, Barletta and his friends have been showing their true colors. Barletta, Mitch McConnell's campaign arm and the Koch brothers have all stepped up their attacks. Bob is taking a stand for every Pennsylvanian whose union rights, civil rights and health care are threatened by this nominee, and he won't back down.

**That's the decision in this election: a Senator who fights for working families with both fists up or someone who bows to corporate interests. Your donation will help keep Bob in the Senate, fighting for what's right.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180712_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180712_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: "Ted Cruz in the dust" (Dallas Morning News)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Hey there!
Take a look at three of the headlines that hit my inbox after our grassroots campaign broke a new fundraising record and outraised Ted Cruz...for the fifth time:
**Beto O'Rourke's torrid fundraising leaves Ted Cruz in the dust, with another $10 million in last 3 months**
* * *
**Beto O'Rourke raises record $10.4 million against Ted Cruz in Texas' Senate race**
* * *
**Beto O'Rourke hauls in $10.4 million, more than double total for incumbent Sen. Ted Cruz**
Clicking through headlines like these gets me so fired up. This movement of people -- not PACs, or special interests, or corporations, or lobbyists -- is proving we can not just compete with Ted Cruz but we can do it in the right way. I've never seen a campaign do what we're doing.
**Our campaign raised $10.4 million from 215,714 individual contributions, all from people just like you. The power of this movement is staggering. But I can guarantee you that Cruz 's super PACs and special interests are reading these headlines too. And they're going to do anything they have to in order to stop our incredible momentum.

[Can you chip in $3 right now to help us capture today's energy and continue closing Cruz's single-digit lead in the polls? We've got less than four months left if we want to pull this off.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92028/3b1d797/74469b1f/35a9e4e2/1999732971/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180712-headlines?refcode=ema180712&amount=3")**
I've sat shotgun as Beto has crisscrossed the state and visited all 254 counties of Texas so he could meet with his fellow Texans. So he could listen, learn, and make their fight his fight. There has never been a community too red or too blue for Beto to show up. There has never been a concern too small or too big for him to champion. That's how he is building a campaign that answers to you -- real people, not PACs or special interests.
And it's working. Every single person who has shown up to a town hall to ask tough questions, who's knocked on doors or made phone calls, who's chipped in what they can to keep gas in the tank of our Dodge Grand Caravan and keep Beto on the road has made a difference. A really big difference. It's no wonder outlets across the state are taking notice of what you're making possible in Texas.
[**But we 've got a long road ahead, and a lot of work left to do. These headlines are proof of what can happen when we all come together and do our part. When we give it everything we've got because everything we care about is on the line. Don't let the special interests stop our momentum at a time we need it the most. Pitch in $3 right now to show you've got Beto's back in this fight >>**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92028/3b1d797/74469b1f/35a9e4e2/1999732971/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180712-headlines?refcode=ema180712&amount=3")
Thanks for all you do!!
Talk soon,
Chris Evans
Beto for Texas
P.S. I can't help but share one last headline. **"_Beto O 'Rourke Raises $10.4 million in second quarter of 2018, again outpacing Ted Cruz by wide margin_" **(Texas Tribune)
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92028/3b1d797/74469b1f/35a9e4e2/1999732971/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180712-headlines?refcode=ema180712&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92028/3b1d797/74469b1f/35a9e4e3/1999732971/VEsD/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92028/3b1d797/74469b1f/35a9e4e4/1999732971/VEsA/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92028/3b1d797/74469b1f/35a9e4e5/1999732971/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Florida Elections HQ
subject: you need to see these headlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| As one of our top supporters, we want to make sure you're aware of the latest news on this year's election, including the Republican National Committee's huge outreach machine and Rick Scott's blatant reliance on special interest donors.

You can read more below on why Florida Democrats need your help, or [**if you 've read enough you can contribute here to support Democrats up and down the ballot in 2018.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-race-update?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+if+yoursquove+read+enough+you+can+contri&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO4_180712_1_1&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO4_180712_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO4_180712_1_1")
* * *
Team, we have less than 17 weeks until Election Day.

_**Each and every day there 's breaking news about Florida races up and down the ballot, and here's the latest news you need to know:**_
* "**Gov. Rick Scott raised more than $10.7 million for his U.S. Senate campaign in less than three months** , a total the campaign calls "historic" and more than any other Senate race in the country." -- _Tampa Bay Times_

* "**The RNC told NBC News it has already made 20 million traditional voter contacts** by phone or door knocking this election cycle, a large number for a nonpresidential election year." -- _NBC News_

* "**More money is being spent on TV advertising in Florida 's U.S. Senate race than anywhere else in the country.** And the state is No. 2 in ad spending in the governor's race, but could easily take the top spot in coming months." -- _Sun Sentinel_

These headlines paint a stark portrait of the GOP's strategy: drown out Democrats and working families by pumping special interest money into a barrage of TV attack ads and top-down organizing.

**Democrats have to get more organized and fight the GOP at the grassroots level.**

[**We need your help to fight back against Rick Scott and elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will protect Floridian families, not special interest backers. Contribute $5 now to help us raise another $5,000 today before midnight.**](http://act.floridadems. name: Mike Braun
subject: Do The Right Thing, Senator Donnelly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Friend- President Trump has delivered on yet another promise to Hoosiers by nominating Brett Kavanaugh, a trusted constitutionalist, to the Supreme Court. [**It is critical that Judge **](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-j/)[**Brett Kavanaugh**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-t/)[** be confirmed to the Supreme Court by the Senate**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-i/) so that we can ensure our religious liberties, the right to life, and the Second Amendment are protected. [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-d/) Senator Joe Donnelly is standing in the way of President Trump and his vision to protect our constitutional rights. **It’s time to do the right thing, Senator Donnelly.** Join me in demanding that Sleepin’ Joe to the right thing and [vote to confirm ](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-h/)[Brett Kavanaugh](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-k/)[ to the Supreme Court!](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjpttkl-kujulhlke-o/) Mike |

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: Running on my record
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=114A135A9A3785)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=114A135A9A3786)
---
| | Friends,

The July 17th runoff election is just a few short days away, and I want to thank each and every person who has helped my campaign for reelection in AL-02 be successful to this point.

I have been humbled to serve as your representative in Congress, and I have been glad to be part of the conservative momentum in our country over the last year and a half. Our unified Republican government has accomplished a lot, and we have a unique opportunity to deliver even more positive change for the American people.

I humbly ask for your support at the polls on Tuesday as I continue to work alongside my colleagues in Congress and the Trump Administration to push more of our conservative priorities over the finish line.

Throughout this campaign, I have run on my conservative Republican record. Here are just a few things that I'd like to share with you before you make your decision on Election Day:

\- As a member of the Defense Appropriations Subcommittee, I am in a strong position to fight for proper funding for our nation's military, both for the sake of our national defense and for the critical missions that take place at Fort Rucker and Maxwell-Gunter Air Force Base. I will continue to use my seat on this important committee to ensure that our men and women in uniform have everything they need when we send them into harm's way. We must ensure that our military remains the tip of the spear.

\- I truly believe that our veterans represent the very best of this country, and as you know, our district has a large veteran population. As your representative in Congress, I have worked tirelessly to repair the broken bureaucracy at the VA and provide proper care to veterans. A lot of work remains to be done on this front, and I will not stop fighting until we get this right.

\- Since agriculture is the largest employer in our district, I know how critically important it is that we get ag policy right on behalf of the hardworking farmers throughout our district and state. I will always fight for policy that helps our farmers instead of making their work harder. I am grateful to have the support and endorsement of House Agriculture Committee Chairman Mike Conaway from Texas. I will always use my seat on the Appropriations Committee to ensure that smart, strong agriculture policy is funded from year to year.

\- On the Appropriations Committee, I voted in favor of putting a down payment on the President's request for a border wall. I believe we must use every tool available to secure our border and put the safety of the American people first. I also serve on the Judiciary Committee, which has oversight of our nation's immigration policy. I will always advocate for smarter immigration policy that serves the best interest of this country and our district.

\- Last, but certainly not least, I remain firmly pro-life. I believe life begins at conception and that our laws must reflect a commitment to defending the sanctity of life at every stage. Let me make something crystal clear: There was no money for abortion in the Omnibus. Not one dime. I will always work to prevent Planned Parenthood and other abortion providers from receiving your tax dollars. Our government must not be involved in the abortion business.

I am eager to return to Washington to continue my work on these important issues on your behalf. I have enjoyed a strong, positive working relationship with the Trump Administration as we deliver the results you asked for, and I am grateful to be endorsed by the President in this election.

Thank you for allowing me to serve you in Congress. I strive each day to be the very best representative of our conservative beliefs that I can be. I humbly ask for your support on Tuesday, June 17th. Remind your friends and family to get out and exercise their right to vote, too!

Please forward this note along to folks you think might be interested in reading it. God bless you, and may God continue to bless this great country.

\- Martha Roby

---

name: The White House
subject: ‘The highest level of special’
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2e401e89a2c3f518c2126df6bd592da6c4f0940df75deb9f0a7b40847a395e187b437571fa4597b5c530febc89037ea16e31aacba002939e) The White House • July 13, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump and the First Lady are receiving an Official Greeting from Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II in Berkshire, England. |
---
|

## ‘The highest level of special’
**President Trump arrived in England yesterday** , where he joined Prime Minister Theresa May for an arrival ceremony and met with U.S. Ambassador to the United Kingdom Woody Johnson. This morning, the President held a bilateral meeting and working lunch with U.K. leaders.
**The President made his priority clear**. “Once the Brexit process is concluded--and perhaps the U.K. has left the EU, I don’t know, whatever you’re going to do is okay with us,” President Trump said. “Just make sure we can trade together. That’s all that matters.”
**Prime Minister May agreed** , saying the two leaders pledged “to pursue an ambitious deal that works for both countries right across our economies.” Both President Trump and the Prime Minister praised the relationship between America and Britain, which President Trump called “the highest level of special.” U.K. leaders have given their American visitors a warm welcome: President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will have tea today with Queen Elizabeth II at Windsor Castle.
[Follow President Trump’s trip to Europe in photos. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2e401e89a2c3f518e03aa84c1fbcc4e4a08515eb6fae0a2648ec525b0e610c6843c6a7d18d99d778a7a5f0affd7d724d4e1b14a0d8784278)
**Watch** : [The President describes America’s special relationship with Britain. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2e401e89a2c3f51890cd0c70cd6a7d2167cb83234a9bb5789b7537ef5b117876d67635fe2bfb9fe7ca09b8b2b3c75f774ac24908cc058718)

---
|

## Stamping out consumer fraud
**President Trump is establishing a task force** to promote market integrity and to combat consumer fraud, comprised of senior officials from the Department of Justice, Federal financial regulators, and members across the Cabinet.
**The Trump Administration has no tolerance** for those who would harm consumers and investors, and it will continue to prosecute fraud to the full extent permitted by law. In February 2018, the Department of Justice announced the largest coordinated sweep of elder fraud cases in history, cracking down on financial schemes that targeted or largely affected older Americans.
**The bottom line** : Consumers and investors should be able to participate in a fair marketplace that rewards sound economic decisions, not fraudulent activity.
[Learn more about President Trump’s fight against fraud. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2e401e89a2c3f518ce94a6082580ff3f17a2188b0e981768188af9e21dca191afa059f800733e879cf7eee015e0dbd9b830fa322cda48f24)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump participate in an arrival ceremony at Blenheim Palace with Prime Minster Theresa May and her husband Philip May** | July 12, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2e401e89a2c3f518c0c240d283eb816a1bc3eda8eaa884588fdc49413156523f55466630d42d388fb9d3bc66a320229412021935827e63f4) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2e401e89a2c3f518c9ff323cc82377c2576ba97f82191e9953dc370ff92d0871d452675f7d831ec1dc708d2833261ef618b034fd5b5251d2) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d481b4dd50dd287a892298f988cf4f913e0b0913b3c48e1cbfa7a637ffe362d77b4d97d04d4eed7da92c44991d99bc1225f0adbda655d4028d)
---

Team --
In the past few months, our team has seen some encouraging signs about our chances this November. **Our campaign has momentum, and our message is resonating with Tennesseans.**
Teachers, farmers, nurses, students, seniors — [**Tennesseans from all walks of life are chipping in $10 or whatever they can to our campaign because they’re fed up with the mess in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1634715/8728036/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjU5NzBkZi1hZDg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgHi_HyJCm55V49-anzhvQS3uBjKmyu96GHVDtpifkI=&refcode=em180713-mm3-miss&recurring=true)

name: Peter Joffrion
subject: Turning a blind eye when faced with abuse
body:
Hi there,
My opponent, incumbent Rep. Mo Brooks, shared a statement supporting Rep. Jim Jordan, who turned a blind eye to the sexual assault of several members of the Ohio State University wrestling team while Jordan was an assistant coach.
Despite statements from the victims that Jordan was aware of the action, Mo Brooks stands by his fellow career politician.
During a live CNN interview, Mo called domestic violence "soap opera news." He also endorsed accused sexual predator Roy Moore in 2017.
Knowing AL-05's congressman takes money from and defends potential abusers and dismisses victims and their stories is something I find extremely disturbing.
The people of North Alabama deserve better from their representatives -- that's why I'm running for Congress. I'll champion the “It’s On Us” initiative here in Alabama so victims will no longer be silenced and belittled further.
In Congress, I'll be a strong advocate for victims and work to ensure their abusers are brought to justice, but I can't win this race on my own. Pitch in today if you believe we need a representative in Washington who won't minimize domestic violence in our district.
Here's the link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterjoffrion4alabama](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1635486/8732305/172365608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2ZlMDZjZi1iNTg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P3sKQWCUHhaaiiDonJi8UhbYH-cCxXNtFrV4KVFnKw8=&refcode=20180713a)**
Thank you,
Peter

P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States

name: Tina Smith
subject: Will you let me be honest with you for a minute about the Supreme Court fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The outcome is about more than just a vote.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ba01/c1f7015/6b5468dc/11423673/2609213596/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july-tina?refcode=rtw_20180713_em-B") Friends, I want to be as honest as I can with you in this important moment. The odds are against us to stop Trump's Supreme Court Justice. Republicans currently have a majority in the Senate, their super PACs and dark money operations are already flooding states like ours with ads and mailers, and Mitch McConnell and Republicans in the Senate have shown absolutely no honesty in this process. You may already know this -- in fact, you may be feeling a bit down because of another attack on our values that feels almost impossible to stop. (This happens to U.S. Senators too.) But when I read headlines this week like I saw on _CNN_ saying, **" Pence: 'I do' still want _Roe v. Wade_ to be overturned,"** all I can think is heck no. I will not back down, I will not give up, and I will not stop fighting no matter what the eventual outcome. I am the only U.S. Senator who has worked at Planned Parenthood, and I'm one of just 17 Democratic pro-choice women in the Senate who wants to keep men out of women's private medical decisions -- whether the men are in the Senate, the White House, or the Supreme Court. I take the representation part of this job, and my duty to carry the voices of the overwhelming majority of Americans who honor a woman's right to safe and legal abortion with me, seriously. So I will fight tooth and nail, lift my voice, and carry your values with me -- but this is not a fight one Senator or even our entire Democratic Caucus can win alone. And it won't be won in Washington, D.C., but by each and every one of you. What you do in this moment -- to fight back, talk to your neighbors, call everyone you can in Washington, and yes, give every dollar you can to take back the Senate and Congress in November so we can stop this once and for all -- will be the difference. **We are in an important moment for our country -- one that will define our politics and our society for generations. You will remember what you did or didn 't do during the Trump administration for years to come.** Remember this and stay strong. Keep fighting. And don't ever stop. clean_body: The outcome is about more than just a vote. | "" Friends, I want to be as honest as I can with you in this important moment. The odds are against us to stop Trump's Supreme Court Justice. Republicans currently have a majority in the Senate, their super PACs and dark money operations are already flooding states like ours with ads and mailers, and Mitch McConnell and Republicans in the Senate have shown absolutely no honesty in this process. You may already know this -- in fact, you may be feeling a bit down because of another attack on our values that feels almost impossible to stop. (This happens to U.S. Senators too.) But when I read headlines this week like I saw on CNN saying, " Pence: 'I do' still want Roe v. Wade to be overturned," all I can think is heck no. I will not back down, I will not give up, and I will not stop fighting no matter what the eventual outcome. I am the only U.S. Senator who has worked at Planned Parenthood, and I'm one of just 17 Democratic pro-choice women in the Senate who wants to keep men out of women's private medical decisions -- whether the men are in the Senate, the White House, or the Supreme Court. I take the representation part of this job, and my duty to carry the voices of the overwhelming majority of Americans who honor a woman's right to safe and legal abortion with me, seriously. So I will fight tooth and nail, lift my voice, and carry your values with me -- but this is not a fight one Senator or even our entire Democratic Caucus can win alone. And it won't be won in Washington, D.C., but by each and every one of you. What you do in this moment -- to fight back, talk to your neighbors, call everyone you can in Washington, and yes, give every dollar you can to take back the Senate and Congress in November so we can stop this once and for all -- will be the difference. We are in an important moment for our country -- one that will define our politics and our society for generations. You will remember what you did or didn 't do during the Trump administration for years to come. Remember this and stay strong. Keep fighting. And don't ever stop. Thank you and more soon, Tina | Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help to hit her July goal if she is going to win this tough race. ""

subject: Last call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This is your last chance.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a695/7ab0e2c4/7ffd8c4b/349b8f33/2086416603/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?refcode=OHQ07138A") Friend, I've been crunching the numbers, and we're falling a bit short of our $25,000 mid-month goal. I know there's so much excitement for progressive Democrats like Ben, but turns out there's also plenty for Republicans like Larry Hogan. We can't ignore that he's raising $1 million a month -- and while we were out fighting to win the primary, he was sitting back, kicking his feet up, and raising a nest egg of over $9 million to defeat us in the general. **I want to win, and I know you do too, so what are you waiting for?** [**We need to raise $4,350 by midnight to meet our mid-month fundraising goal: Donate $5 or more now to fund the fight to defeat Larry Hogan.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a695/7ab0e2c4/7ffd8c4b/349b8f33/2086416603/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?refcode=OHQ07138A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a695/7ab0e2c4/7ffd8c4b/349b8f3d/2086416603/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?amount=5&refcode=OHQ07138A&express_lane=true")

name: Campaign Manager Stacy Schuster
subject: Setting the Record Straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
Just over a month from our resounding primary victory, our campaign has continued to pick up momentum. The response from voters on the trail has been | |
---
|
---
Friends -

Just over a month from our resounding primary victory, our campaign has continued to pick up momentum. The response from voters on the trail has been incredibly positive and our message is resonating. Nearly **[40 percent of Democrats voted against Senator Menendez](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=dd7a59e4d3574971a29c5f9a32c64f5d&_e=D13H3cpyYS3gMjIugbm8r9F4i4thBXdX7ZFhgrgkDwm1uAo-Uc6gExhENl7QlCFyCdR1BwL9U8yMMxs9br6zKA-Lzyx5Yg519u6L7RR2fTh9XJy05efpJkv8qxzClZcnUiv_TTdcfn-gT7jMFtRkucbfapYMcGvd3ZhxPh3OmK6Jw2DZThuoh0r8mJfpYTSDMV1gW2xnB-56YqC2PApXVeiTwx6hoCIU5YvAVbw4rlOhAoDelIZCWDRGQBiNMJxXyTRq-vocJoUS_G-DfsNDHS2G6TwdzTgwRFNQrb1uB-3cm0-yMGH7FWV50h28fDkJDM4qk6JM4FRSxYrYPBo_SvDcvVnU3tuBhLAiq2OzezuE3A_p1UmlmqtzeCz3BxKgwIf-UPK41yFsAJABWCQ7hDHBcGzstB1pQx8ebIZM3jA%3D)** in last month’s Primary Election, public polling shows us within **[just 4 points](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=dd7a59e4d3574971a29c5f9a32c64f5d&_e=D13H3cpyYS3gMjIugbm8r96x-zx49-XXocaznAN4A7noW16BujUXQo86vrBMR-Cfd1-FvD-zB5azs-ij02LTQvbVx-dmQDRanEsgPFtkUGeFJH1EuMrGXnGxrU_wQrjmkjm0XHjky43ANQCv12IV90-8_EhAxkCaXBs_4ZDY3FVJp-80seGBASOkCus61gpezJmzOdCrtRzNo8txGih1p9VIBHYI33Yq7ZtO7_txpHs5h5A-tZLQImdLHUtB0rP6Q8CWaBgoOUI4xwKa3Iry7zAk2XuTVCWBNvl52DaBb2RCBVjaoCuSXixo6bkD1hdGNAN6-iNU7fTqIawBKaqO-tY6_oNCbTmyrDiaPy0Qvqt2sQBXSTmhkhNgHT7xCTUndISjNhoAJudyakCHpd6khbi7Q4zEuTBU8lmhFEiIC4_T-t9Epj8CtuMbTIPVTOK-)** , and the national press is paying attention.

Now, for the first time, it’s clear that corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez is feeling the pressure.

His campaign chairman called Bob Hugin a "bloodsucker" and even went so far as to infer that he killed people during his time at Celgene. Yes, you read that right. These disgusting attacks are fitting of a desperate politician like Bob Menendez and clear evidence that he’s scared. But we can’t turn the other cheek. We need to fight back!

Our new ad, titled “**[Ryan](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=dd7a59e4d3574971a29c5f9a32c64f5d&_e=D13H3cpyYS3gMjIugbm8r2KQDVfuFbYb11Sbj4OoaB8qeKJcyT9fit_WAnbWR6MOhOISL7TNq-zO_LPjZEVvHgmvxY96ZpeTEOISSjWJgVGBUfB2NoOqUTgH8mCxgqmG0Cofw08KbgzY8OukGCidqX4f6OPqrBvl82rvEyjkVMM_OA5Z5-nzg5_AVuVvf2XXy9M_Frw6gT9gEm3IrcgtFymoy4aUyZobmGufuHfukUCCpVlfgAI-6WyqYmAmQazM_ax5kqpMFmgKFaWkKWcQbwQqkeQwMDwlEuGvuru9lJ3XQ3syhYWR9xJEMOuzC2B637uE7Sh5xVPLpFE_RUZ2diLPtxPIGUoWDK2BjwFDU8k%3D)** ” makes sure that New Jerseyans hear the real story about Bob Hugin and his record at Celgene. Click the play button below to watch the ad and hear from a father who saw Bob’s compassion and humanity up close.
|

[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=dd7a59e4d3574971a29c5f9a32c64f5d&_e=D13H3cpyYS3gMjIugbm8r2KQDVfuFbYb11Sbj4OoaB8qeKJcyT9fit_WAnbWR6MOhOISL7TNq-zO_LPjZEVvHgmvxY96ZpeTEOISSjWJgVGBUfB2NoOqUTgH8mCxgqmG0Cofw08KbgzY8OukGCidqfUU7bLBcUdf9Wcteb25YuY9lU6zm6vlnhbOPTg9qXe3Pl9nd-Uz7CSatw5tc4GE6gjfZ-qYK2BvWBUys1qNwQkKolCtyxWpI29hgcXxdvGErCGdiiv2M5OZjjgusvL0xeZ0161pIFP8QWM2qTn1RtVX1G9hpsN_J-5Epb-2MBQ-mGifT_jhQIfwKhd9ioWOzX2E6YzrV1yyOY7MT-1XSTY%3D)
|
---
We need your help to make sure everyone in New Jersey knows the Bob Hugin we know. Please SHARE this ad with your friends and tell them to reject the despicable lies being told by the Menendez camp.

Bob Hugin spent the last two decades working to improve the quality and extend the lives of people diagnosed with terminal disease. Bob Menendez abused his office to do the bidding of a convicted felon who stole from Medicare and blinded patients, was indicted for bribery by the Obama Justice Department, and was found guilty of violating federal law by the bipartisan Senate Ethics Committee for taking $1 million in illegal gifts. Those are the facts.

Together, we will continue to make sure New Jerseyans hear the truth so that in November, we can send a message that character counts and elect a Senator that we can be proud of.

Stacy Schuster
Campaign Manager

subject: Urgent: take action
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | This can't wait, Republicans in Congress are closer than ever to squeezing **more than $500 billion from Medicare** over the next decade. Protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions could disappear. The Affordable Care Act is on the chopping block, with no viable alternative to replace it. Again. **Everything we stand for is at risk.** And it's our families who will pay the price. Our loved ones will lose health insurance. Our parents and grandparents will suffer the cuts to Medicare. Our families and neighbors and friends will be left wondering if they're one illness from financial ruin. We must stand up to this administration and fight for our rights and values. I'm fighting for you. **Will you step up to fight by my side?** | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f01/622b7b5b/1ba09c5b/307b9e6b/633119995/VEsH/ "https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/deadline")
---
[**We need to meet our $30,000 July goal before the month's out. Consider this a personal request -- if you can, make a contribution at this secure link:**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f01/622b7b5b/1ba09c5b/307b9e6b/633119995/VEsE/ "https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/deadline")
[**https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/deadline**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f01/622b7b5b/1ba09c5b/307b9e6b/633119995/VEsF/ "https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/deadline")
Thank you,
Debbie

Our families and neighbors and friends will be left wondering if they're one illness from financial ruin. We must stand up to this administration and fight for our rights and values. I'm fighting for you. Will you step up to fight by my side? | | | "" "" "" Thank you, Debbie Sent from my iPad | | | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Team, the three bills Senate Republicans plan to introduce on public lands spell major trouble.

That's why Martin is organizing now so we can stop these bills from ever becoming reality. [**Add your name to our petition immediately to tell Senate Republicans: Keep your hands OFF public lands! ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b669/43d8135f/60ca7743/5100f3ee/2975495736/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/keep-hands-off-public-lands?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+our+petition+immediatel&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2")

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

| **Public Lands Alert:** **Republican senator to propose new bills to attack and sell off public lands.**

If these bills pass, they will eliminate our public lands. [**We need to fight back, and you can help by signing our petition here ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b669/43d8135f/60ca7743/5100f011/2975495736/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/keep-hands-off-public-lands?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+fight+back+and+you+can+help+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2")
---

I have some troubling news on three potential bills that could end public lands as we know them.

**A Senate Republican just announced he will introduce a trio of bills that will virtually gut all public land protections.**

He will propose giving the lands to the states (which will result in our land being auctioned off to the highest bidder), opening public lands up to use by companies for virtually any reason, and abolishing the Antiquities Act, which has protected our public lands and heritage for over a century.

[**These bills are an attack on our public lands and our way of life. Join me in telling Senate Republicans to keep their hands off our public lands!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b669/43d8135f/60ca7743/5100f010/2975495736/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/keep-hands-off-public-lands?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+These+bills+are+an+attack+on+our+public+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2")

[HANDS OFF PUBLIC LANDS!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b669/43d8135f/60ca7743/5100f013/2975495736/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/keep-hands-off-public-lands?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+HANDS+OFF+PUBLIC+LANDS&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2")
New Mexico's public lands fuel our economy and our culture. Our identities and our livelihoods are connected to our open spaces. But if these bills pass, we will be shut out of our own land.

We know President Trump doesn't care about public lands. His recent pardon of the ranchers who deliberately set fires to public lands to cover up poaching, endangering the lives of firefighters, showed us that. If these bills end up on his desk, the president will sign them -- and eliminate our public lands as we know them.

[**That 's why I am organizing now so we can stop these bills before they become a reality. Will you sign my petition immediately and tell Senate Republicans to keep their hands off public lands?**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b669/43d8135f/60ca7743/5100f012/2975495736/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/keep-hands-off-public-lands?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Thatrsquos+why+I+am+organizing+now+so+we&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2")

[SIGN ON TODAY](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b669/43d8135f/60ca7743/5100f015/2975495736/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/keep-hands-off-public-lands?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+SIGN+ON+TODAY&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180713_1_2")
I'll be sure to keep you updated on these bills and how we can stop future attacks on public lands.

\-- Martin

clean_body: | | | | Team, the three bills Senate Republicans plan to introduce on public lands spell major trouble. That's why Martin is organizing now so we can stop these bills from ever becoming reality. "" Begin original message from Martin Heinrich: | Public Lands Alert: Republican senator to propose new bills to attack and sell off public lands. If these bills pass, they will eliminate our public lands. "" I have some troubling news on three potential bills that could end public lands as we know them. A Senate Republican just announced he will introduce a trio of bills that will virtually gut all public land protections. He will propose giving the lands to the states (which will result in our land being auctioned off to the highest bidder), opening public lands up to use by companies for virtually any reason, and abolishing the Antiquities Act, which has protected our public lands and heritage for over a century. "" "" New Mexico's public lands fuel our economy and our culture. Our identities and our livelihoods are connected to our open spaces. But if these bills pass, we will be shut out of our own land. We know President Trump doesn't care about public lands. His recent pardon of the ranchers who deliberately set fires to public lands to cover up poaching, endangering the lives of firefighters, showed us that. If these bills end up on his desk, the president will sign them -- and eliminate our public lands as we know them. "" "" I'll be sure to keep you updated on these bills and how we can stop future attacks on public lands. \-- Martin | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends! name: Citizens for Turner
subject: Gasper's Bad Week Gets Worse
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | **Gasper’s Bad Week Gets Worse** _Conducts a Poll in Preble County_
**After receiving**[**cease and desist letters**](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=961960&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.daytondailynews.com%2Fnews%2Flocal%2Fcentral-state-warned-candidate-theresa-gasper-against-implying-school-endorsement%2FIwa1XtELXPy9ToZPS6xEEM%2F)**from local universities for illegally**[**using their names for political fundraising**](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=961960&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.daytondailynews.com%2Fnews%2Fnational-govt--politics%2Fschools-democratic-candidate-remove-our-names-from-campaign-material%2FTebYmwz9L3Ww5jwFY1YMLO%2F)**, Theresa Gasper has wasted that money conducting a negative poll in the wrong Congressional District.**
“This is just another sloppy, irresponsible example of why Theresa Gasper doesn’t deserve the trust of voters,” **said Kevin Doering, Deputy Campaign Manager of Citizens for Turner.** “How can she seek to represent the 10th District if she doesn’t even know where it is? If she would like some help, she can go to our [website](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=961960&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fmiketurner.com%2F) and see a map of the 10th Congressional District, which includes Montgomery, Greene, and the northern half of Fayette County.”
“In addition to her careless management, Gasper squandered her supporters’ money on a worthless poll. How can she be responsible for taxpayers’ dollars when her own donors’ money is wasted?”**Doering added.**

---
| | | | [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=961960&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FMikeTurnerforCongress%2F)[](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=961960&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FMikeTurnerOH)

name: Jessica Morse
subject: 160,000 reasons we need a new representative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_logo&recurring=auto)
Team,

I'd bet almost every person on this list knows someone, or is someone, who relies on Social Security or Medicare. Over 160,000 seniors in our district--almost a quarter of our voters--rely on these programs, including some of my family members. We have invested our hard-earned salaries into Social Security our entire lives and have earned the right to withdraw on that investment.

That's why we felt betrayed when Tom McClintock supported last year's tax plan, which will add 1.8 trillion dollars to our deficit. He and his allies intend to pay for this with cuts to essential programs like Social Security, Medicare, and more.

Tom McClintock has over 160,000 reasons to defend Social Security and Medicare--but he defended tax breaks for special interests instead, which is why they'll spend whatever it takes to keep him in office. My campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you--can you chip in now?

[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_15&amount=15&recurring=auto) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_25&amount=25&recurring=auto)
---|---
[$50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_50&amount=50&recurring=auto) | [$100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_100&amount=100&recurring=auto)
[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_250&amount=250&recurring=auto) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_other&recurring=auto)

Seniors who've worked hard all their lives, and paid dutifully into Social Security, should be able to draw on their investment and retire in safety and security--but McClintock voted for a budget that would slash $4 billion from Social Security and a whopping $537 billion from Medicare. He's bargaining away our seniors' retirement and peace of mind to pay for the $1.8 trillion he voted to add to the deficit.

It's time for McClintock to go, and for us to elect a leader who'll fight for us, not against us. [_**I 'll fight to keep these vital programs intact. Can you help me do it with a donation of $25 or more now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_l1&recurring=auto)
Thank you,
Jessica
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/cqfzqVVknaohyIk-2Y1EwitXeoqYBzgTWQlMen7ER5A=/lnPzoeNiqeo_UgG4E7QYtI8xw8zV0guIHC9xGQt8sdw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180713_JM_socialsec_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto)

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen for Senate
subject: Leaked audio: “Death by 10,000 cuts”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team, I'll cut to the chase — a recording that was just leaked from a meeting of partisan activists in Nashville features our opponent's top Washington strategist saying they'll win this race by inflicting **"death by 10,000 cuts"** on our campaign and creating what he called **"a very good controversy."**
Our opposition is coming unhinged.
He even threatened Gov. Bredesen, saying: **"We're going to constantly punch him in his face... over and over and over again."**
We always knew that the Washington establishment wasn’t happy about the kind of campaign Governor Bredesen is running, or our momentum. **But this makes the stakes crystal clear — this is exactly the kind of hate-filled, negative partisanship that's paralyzing Washington and our country.**
[**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to help us match the 10,000 cuts with $10,000 in grassroots support? Your help is the only way we'll be able to keep this race from getting dragged into the mud of partisan politics.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1638804/8748421/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZlYmY5NS1kZjg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKuqDmaoMmhrLdtyoHZwA2Etb4B0RE35T7p_TRq5jKk=&refcode=em180713-mm4-miss&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1638805/8748422/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZlYmY5NS1kZjg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKuqDmaoMmhrLdtyoHZwA2Etb4B0RE35T7p_TRq5jKk=&refcode=em180713-mm4-miss&recurring=true)**
That's not all that came out of the recording. The strategist also took aim at the hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans crossing party lines to support Governor Bredesen, saying:
_**"We have a list of everybody that's screwing us. I think some of them will come back. And the ones that don't, I'll do everything in my power to make sure that they have trouble living in the future."**_
_Here's the reality:_ These kinds of extreme hyper-partisan attacks won't create jobs. They won't solve the opioid epidemic. They won't tackle the national debt or make college more affordable. They're just going to divide people and make it harder to get anything done.
**Governor Bredesen wants to bring change to Washington.** Our campaign is open to anyone, from any party, who is tired of the hyper-partisan squabbling and wants to bring common sense back to Washington. And that's not going to change.
Bob Corney
Campaign Manager
Bredesen For Senate
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1638806/8748423/775167377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZlYmY5NS1kZjg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKuqDmaoMmhrLdtyoHZwA2Etb4B0RE35T7p_TRq5jKk=&refcode=em180713-mm4-miss&recurring=true)**
[PS — Listen to the audio for yourself here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1638807/8748424/441725565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmZlYmY5NS1kZjg2LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKuqDmaoMmhrLdtyoHZwA2Etb4B0RE35T7p_TRq5jKk=)

PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE

For Immediate Release: Friday, July 13, 2018
Contact: [Emily Taylor Johnson](mailto:emily@martharoby.com), 334.717.0461

Vice President Mike Pence Endorses Roby

MONTGOMERY, AL -- Vice President Mike Pence today joined President Donald Trump in endorsing U.S. Representative Martha Roby (R-AL) in her campaign for reelection in Alabama's Second Congressional District saying in a tweet:

"President Trump and I support Martha Roby - a strong supporter of tax cuts & President Trump's pro-growth, America First agenda! Get out Tuesday and support Team Roby."

Representative Roby expressed gratitude to the Vice President for his endorsement and reaffirmed her commitment to their shared conservative agenda:

"I am very grateful to Vice President Pence for his support in my campaign for reelection in Alabama's Second District. I was fortunate to serve with the Vice President in the House, and I am proud to call him a friend. I deeply appreciate his endorsement, and I am eager to continue working with the Administration in the fight for our shared conservative priorities."

###

name: Brendan McPhillips, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Republicans are scared.
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37fe/9e00690/597516c9/2402cdf8/1553976159/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180712_RAttac_fnd_gq_nono__BmP_ettx&source=em18_180712_RAttac_fnd_gq_nono__BmP_ettx")
Friends,

When Andrew launched this campaign, pundits were skeptical that a non-millionaire could be a real contender for Governor -- but now, Andrew's bold progressive plan for Florida is picking up momentum -- and the Republican candidates in the race are scared.

Recently, a Republican candidate sent out a fundraising email attacking Andrew's progressive stance on immigration, saying he was committed to keeping "criminals and drugs" out of our country.

**[If you're with us to stand up for Floridians no matter where they're from, chip in $5 to our Rapid Response Fund.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37fe/9e00690/597516c9/2402cdfb/1553976159/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-republican-attacks?gpsid=13_55_2002&refcode=em18_180712_RAttac_fnd_gq_nono__BmP_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180712_RAttac_fnd_gq_nono__BmP_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+If+youre+with+us+to+stand+up+for+Floridi")**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: RNC attacking us (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | According to _CNN_ , the GOP is targeting Ohio with "an extensive field program, digital ads, and op-eds." Attacks from the Republican National Committee (RNC) are nothing new. But these come with just under four months left in the race. | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f0/604496841/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?refcode=sbe180712_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
The closer we get to Election Day, the more damage attacks like these can do to our campaign. We have to respond the way we always have: with strong grassroots organizing.
[**I'm asking you Peter: Can you rush in $5 or more to help us fight these latest attacks?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f0/604496841/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?refcode=sbe180712_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f7/604496841/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180712_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f7/604496841/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180712_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f7/604496841/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180712_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f0/604496841/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?refcode=sbe180712_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
The RNC can try to change perceptions -- but no matter how much they spend, they can't change the truth:
The truth is that we fight so women can make their own medical choices and families can access affordable healthcare.
We fight to make sure workers have livable wages, good working conditions, and the pensions they earned.
We fight for seniors and students, manufacturers and small businesses, and everyone in between.
[**As long as we have the resources to make that clear, we will win this November.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f0/604496841/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?refcode=sbe180712_m_other&refcode2=3268183") We build those resources one $26 average online contribution at a time.
The RNC may be on the attack -- but as long as we [**keep working together one $26 contribution at a time, we can and will come out ahead.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9db/4462dc26/5547670d/200782f0/604496841/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180712?refcode=sbe180712_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

---
With immense gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Nothing to say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
McCaskill had plenty to say when Obama nominated two hard liberal Supreme Court Justices This week, members of the media asked Senator McCaskill what she thought of Supreme Court nominee Judge Kavanaugh, an opportunity she could have used to identify with Missourians finally. Instead, what was her response? _**"I have absolutely nothing to say. Nothing to say about the Supreme Court nominee."**_ Nothing to say? _Really?_
**Let me give you a hand, Senator.** There’s plenty you could say about Judge Kavanaugh: he is a staunch defender of individual liberty, that he has proven himself to be a brilliant judge, or that his experience on the bench more than qualifies him to serve on the Supreme Court.
McCaskill had plenty to say when Obama nominated two hard liberal Supreme Court Justices, announcing her support as quickly as she possibly could.
McCaskill knows that having a Justice like Judge Kavanaugh will benefit Missouri for years to come, _**but she is too loyal to Chuck Schumer to admit it**._
Senator McCaskill's obfuscation is yet another example of McCaskill putting party over her people, and it’s another example of why I need your help to win this race. Missouri deserves a senator who will put Missouri, not party leadership, first.
[Donate Today, and help Team Hawley make that change happen.](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c9da81c6fc7646bba73afe4cd48ab4aa&_e=Cry0rZDmFagMNJaQ7OlUaBejiAxXFnDERKhCf-3ZF3HeNpeX9d0vg-mMRObM7uyuh8MW4RjtzAjth3Mq7eOl4kqmKGsiVRaZWXX6ohibaoy9_M63qD0Bant408P3-Nd8VciNwfKQgtu4kVgRro0rUEBLxEnRpKCnxROjSmpxXrZ0PpzegnHsKb_3FM1yEa962QnPQdKTKw07g5P87z3tk06yetsZjrPLq_PWyj2ZHv8CjyEdB-YLj7ihnmRG3p4yNsXG4UaVuyqylcI5Tmtl-umFG_QQtakuLAN1x4qMnvI%3D) [ Stand With Josh - Donate Now! ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c9da81c6fc7646bba73afe4cd48ab4aa&_e=Cry0rZDmFagMNJaQ7OlUaBejiAxXFnDERKhCf-3ZF3HeNpeX9d0vg-mMRObM7uyuh8MW4RjtzAjth3Mq7eOl4mJo-lImIVq1XGoeVzdW-NIyPnFa2fDqMmJ7c7-CwWooZsq41L5Nltzc3A7K6xxzNZM6F-Hvz63GN-lwwNbmZE3PzSEHnuJT1AKwlKIHYWbu0W7w0XDHKdqV9QVRjI20T_sal-piElH3_bRx3ICg8zRFuDY4_RQilp22sipKyCd-5sm1WXNypVLGhHHGolysDhvkpX1FV5ZHL7rS3R4gWNw%3D) For Missouri,Josh Hawley

name: Whitney Spears
subject: I was an unemployed military wife, and I was ready for change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Hi Derek,

My name is Whitney Spears, and I'm a Team Kaine field organizer in Chesterfield County. I want to share with you why I'm so proud to be a part of this team, and tell you about the important work we're doing all across this Commonwealth.

When my husband joined the military, I - like many other military spouses - placed my career on hold in order to take care of our family. As we moved from one duty station to another, I focused on making sure our three wonderful daughters were able to thrive in their ever-changing environments.

But because we were moving around so much, I wasn't able to get the experience I needed for my job, to reach my personal career goals. **Military spouses are unemployed somewhere between three and five times the national average, and I was one of them.**

Fast forward to November of last year: My husband was medically discharged with a lifelong injury, and we settled here in Virginia. I decided I didn't want to get just any job - I wanted to do something focused on the issues that matter to my family and community. And then, earlier this year, I attended a rally in Powhatan for Tim Kaine.

Tim talked about the importance of protecting the Affordable Care Act and expanding access to affordable health care to all Virginians. He discussed early childhood education, supporting teachers, and all the ways we can help our Commonwealth's children reach their full potential. _And he shared the ways he was working to combat military spouse unemployment and level the playing field for people like me._

Shortly after, he proved that not only does he bring light to the issue of military spouse unemployment, but he also brings change. Me becoming a member of this team proves that.

**Now, I have a job, and not just any job: I spend my days making phone calls, knocking on doors, recruiting volunteers, and doing everything I can to make sure Tim Kaine and all the Democrats on the ballot this year win in November.**

I am so inspired by the work I see members of this team doing. Volunteers and organizers are giving their time, their commitment, and their support to this campaign every single day to keep Virginia's blue wave going strong.

**Your support goes towards making sure organizers like me have the resources we need to make lasting change in our community. When you chip in, you 're standing with me and my team:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1269/3e0906/69943ad9/3e35e965/28683089/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story&source=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1269/3e0906/69943ad9/3e35e964/28683089/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story&source=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story")
---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1269/3e0906/69943ad9/3e35e97b/28683089/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story_100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story&source=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1269/3e0906/69943ad9/3e35e97a/28683089/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story&source=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story")
---
I'm so proud to be a part of the team that's working to build a Virginia that works for all, and ensure my three daughters grow up in an environment that encourages them to succeed.

[If you're proud to be on Team Kaine too, chip in now to open more offices, talk to more voters, and train the next generation of Virginia's leaders >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1269/3e0906/69943ad9/3e35e979/28683089/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+If+yoursquore+proud+to+be+on+Team+Kaine+&utm_campaign=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story&source=20180713_1_FR_WS_Personal-Story")

Thank you so much for reading. Go #TeamKaine!

_Whitney_

Whitney B. Spears
Chesterfield Field Organizer
Virginia Victory 2018

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: very short note (Supreme Court)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
By now you've heard that President Trump has nominated another Judge to join the Supreme Court.
With health care protections, voting rights, reproductive freedom, LGBTQ equality, and more on the line, I'm fighting my heart out to make sure our fundamental rights are protected.
I'm giving this my undivided attention, and I can't take a lot of time to focus on fundraising. My team says that we're a bit behind where we'd like to be at this point in the month, and $3 from you would help get us back on track.
**I have to ask:[Will you please give $3 or more to help us hit our mid-July benchmark so that I can stay focused on the Supreme Court?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0f5/2a380d31/ce0819d/f1a415/339007227/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDcxM19NaWRNb250aDFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180713_MidMonth1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Thank you in advance for your support -- I sincerely appreciate your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: One week left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c43c6/24c69fd9/182da127b/18825d7c/312343467/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES30N_digital_email_20180713_LastFilingDeadline_inact&source=WQEFES30N_digital_email_20180713_LastFilingDeadline_inact")
---

Peter,

There's just **one week left** until the final candidate filing deadline of the 2018 election.

Once the filing period closes on July 20th in Louisiana, we'll know who is going to be on the ballot in every single state.

But even before then, we have some great news to share: More women are running for office this year than _ever_ before.

And we have already endorsed dozens of pro-choice Democratic women for the Senate, House, governors' seats, and state legislatures.

**[Donate $3 to help elect a historic number of pro-choice Democratic women this year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c43c6/24c69fd9/182da127b/18825d7d/312343467/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180713_email_LastFilingDeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+a+historic+number&utm_campaign=WQEFES30N_digital_email_20180713_LastFilingDeadline_inact&source=WQEFES30N_digital_email_20180713_LastFilingDeadline_inact")**

We've already endorsed 12 pro-choice Democratic women for the Senate, 55 for the House, 11 for governor, and 169 for state and local office.

These women are critical to taking back the House, flipping the Senate, and turning state legislatures blue from coast to coast.

And with 19 state primaries still to go, we have our eyes on many election days before November.

**Donate $3 to help elect hundreds of pro-choice Democratic women this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Hundreds](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c43c6/24c69fd9/182da127b/18825d7e/312343467/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180713_email_LastFilingDeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectHundreds&utm_campaign=WQEFES30N_digital_email_20180713_LastFilingDeadline_inact&source=WQEFES30N_digital_email_20180713_LastFilingDeadline_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

Hey there -
**_The Washington Post_ has reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" - and that we have no room for error in the fight for Senate control.**
**Democrats need to go all-in in Nevada, especially with President Trump recently here fundraising for Dean Heller.** With a recent poll showing us neck and neck with GOP extremist Dean Heller, this is shaping up to be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country.

name: Tom Perez
subject: Today's indictments:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Earlier today, Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein announced new charges against 12 Russian intelligence officers accused of hacking the Democratic National Committee and the Clinton campaign.
---
Earlier today, Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein announced new charges against 12 Russian intelligence officers accused of hacking the Democratic National Committee and the Clinton campaign in 2016.

This indictment from Special Counsel Robert Mueller makes it clearer than ever: The Russian government attacked our democracy in 2016, and the DNC was a primary target of that attack. We have also learned just how vast this operation was -- including Russian intelligence officers' intrusion into the website of a state election board and theft of information related to approximately 500,000 voters.

That's not just an attack on the DNC. That's an attack on American voters.

This is not a witch hunt and it's certainly not a joke, as Donald Trump has desperately and incorrectly argued in the past. Trump and his Republican enablers' efforts to discredit these established facts only embolden Putin's Russia and invite further attacks on our country.

The American people deserve to know the truth, and the special counsel's investigation is ongoing.

**[It's time for Donald Trump and his allies in the Republican Party to stop ignoring this threat to our national security. If you agree, it's an important day for you to say so -- add your name now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405210b1/4067b0a/67eecc8ab/7fb23d0a/30140504/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/national-security?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Its+time+for+Donald+Trump+and+his+allies&utm_campaign=em_20180713_tp_nd&source=em_20180713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180713_tp_nd")**

Thank you,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

name: Our Revolution
subject: Stand with Our Revolution, Campaign for America's Future, and the Progressive Democrats of America to demand all 2018 candidates support a "jobs for all" plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Next week, Sen. Bernie Sanders is hosting a live stream to amplify the voices of American workers who barely make enough in wages to get by. Meanwhile, their bosses are making billions of dollars in p
#
Friends,
Next week, Sen. Bernie Sanders is hosting a live stream to amplify the voices of American workers who barely make enough in wages to get by. Meanwhile, their bosses are making billions of dollars in profits and receiving massive compensation packages.
**[You can stand in solidarity with these workers right now by signing our petition to guarantee good jobs for all.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa63/bed43eb/63778eb1/75fd438d/1590821233/VEsH/ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-now-demand-all-2018-candidates-support-a-jobs-for-all-plan-that-invests-in-us-workers?source=direct_link&referrer=group-our-revolution")**
In today's world, it has become commonplace for corporate CEOs to receive million dollar bonuses while workers struggle to put food on the table. This extreme income inequality is exactly what we are fighting against. In the wealthiest nation in the world, no one who works 40 hours a week should be forced to live in poverty.
**[Stand with Our Revolution and Campaign for America's Future to demand all 2018 candidates support a "jobs for all" plan -- like Bernie Sanders' \-- that invests in U.S. workers.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa63/bed43eb/63778eb1/75fd438d/1590821233/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-now-demand-all-2018-candidates-support-a-jobs-for-all-plan-that-invests-in-us-workers?source=direct_link&referrer=group-our-revolution")**
A nation-wide job guarantee will revitalize neighborhoods and entire regions -- and it will better prepare us for economic downturns.
Already, 10,000 Americans have pledged to fight for such an economic agenda. Tax cuts for the rich won't create good jobs in communities harmed by discrimination, segregation, or runaway factories or rural isolation.
**[You can be a part of the political revolution right now by signing our petition demanding good jobs for all.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa63/bed43eb/63778eb1/75fd438d/1590821233/VEsF/ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-now-demand-all-2018-candidates-support-a-jobs-for-all-plan-that-invests-in-us-workers?source=direct_link&referrer=group-our-revolution")**
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution, Campaign for America's Future, and the Progressive Democrats of America
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa63/bed43eb/63778eb1/75fd438f/1590821233/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa63/bed43eb/63778eb1/75fd438e/1590821233/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). **NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JULY 13TH**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,

It has been a great week for Granite State Republicans!

Monday night, **President Trump** announced his nomination for the Supreme Court vacancy - **Judge Brett Kavanaugh. **

Judge Kavanaugh is an excellent and qualified Constitutionalist, and we need to put the pressure on Senators Shaheen and Hassan to give him a fair process until he is confirmed. clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JULY 13TH | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, It has been a great week for Granite State Republicans! Monday night, President Trump announced his nomination for the Supreme Court vacancy - Judge Brett Kavanaugh. Judge Kavanaugh is an excellent and qualified Constitutionalist, and we need to put the pressure on Senators Shaheen and Hassan to give him a fair process until he is confirmed. We've launched this week to organize Granite Staters in support of his nomination - Then, yesterday, the New Hampshire Supreme Court authored an opinion confirming what we all knew was true - that HB1264 , the Voter Integrity bill, is constitutional. On the heels of that decision, Governor Chris Sununu signed that crucial bill into law today. Finally, on Saturday, Republican energy in 2018 will be on full display as we open our victory office in Londonderry - Let's make next week even better! Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. NHGOP Raffle! #FireTheIntern Digital Ad PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK Team Sununu in full force at the Laconia parade on Saturday! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on dedicated GOP Activist Jodi Nelson! Jodi does so much for the New Hampshire and Derry GOPs, and we appreciate everything she does! From event organizing to rallying our volunteers for phone banks and canvassing, Jodi is always ready to lead and support our party! Thank you, Jodi, for all you do!
