subject: Trouble for Democrat Donnelly
body:
New polling came out this week, and it spells trouble for Democrat Joe Donnelly. That's because we're still months away from Election Day, and yet... |
---
| |
---
| **_G.O.Party is THIS TUESDAY!_**
_**Reminder**_ : **Governor Eric Holcomb** , **Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer **and our **2018 statewide team** are hosting a BIG party at the Lucas Oil Estate this Tuesday. RSVP now, and make sure you don't miss out.
**Individual: [RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4d89718bde&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
Non-Individual (Corporations, PACs, LLPs):[ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4497447a1b&e=1acd9bb3d6)[RSVP Here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4af2b94d77&e=1acd9bb3d6)! **
Learn more [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbd1a14bf3&e=1acd9bb3d6), and RSVP to Corinne at [CHerndon@indiana.gop](mailto:CHerndon@indiana.gop)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Trouble for Democrat Donnelly_** New polling came out this week, and it spells trouble for Democrat Joe Donnelly. Our Republican U.S. Senate candidate,**Mike Braun** , [has taken the lead](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e5ac23593f&e=1acd9bb3d6) against Democrat Joe Donnelly, leading 49% to 47%. And as a incumbent still months away from Election Day, Democrat Donnelly has to be worried.

But polling isn't the only thing that must be worrying Democrat Donnelly these days. That's because this week, President Trump announced a fantastic pick for the U.S. Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh. Judge Kavanaugh is a well-qualified, mainstream nominee. He is a respected legal mind, and his credentials are impeccable. With more than 300 published opinions, Judge Kavanaugh has demonstrated he will apply the law as written and enforce the text, structure, and original understanding of the Constitution. But as you know, that's not good enough for Democrats, who had [their signs](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5e3ccb06a8&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [their statements](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=296033abf8&e=1acd9bb3d6) ready before they even knew who President Trump would nominate. Their "fill in the blank" outrage was on full display this week.

And that means that Democrat Donnelly has a choice to make: He'll either side with Hoosiers and vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh, or he'll side with his Democrat boss Chuck Schumer and vote to obstruct filling our nation's Supreme Court bench.

We know where **Mike Braun** stands. This week he called Judge Kavanaugh an "outstanding" choice. But where does Democrat Donnelly stand? He voted for 99% of Barack Obama's judicial nominees, but he can't tell us where he stands on confirming Judge Kavanaugh.

We must keep these poll numbers moving, so that the poll on Election Day shows **Mike Braun** going to Washington. But in order to make that happen, there's still a lot of work that has to happen along the way.

-Kyle

_Photo: Chairman Kyle Hupfer joins members of the Indiana 8th District GOP Committee this week to provide an update from the Indiana Republican Party, and to encourage them to keep up the great work heading into this November's critical elections. _
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
| **_Keeping Our Schools Safe_**
This week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** [announced a major new program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a8c926d9e&e=1acd9bb3d6), which will provide Indiana schools with another resource to help keep students, teachers and staff safe.

Handheld metal detectors will now be available at no cost to schools that want them throughout the state, helping schools watch over what comes into their buildings.

This new tool comes as **Governor Holcomb** has made millions of extra dollars available to schools already this year for safety measures, including $35 million in low-interest loans to make school buildings more secure, an additional $5 million to support school safety grants, and $1 million to support a full audit of school safety plans around the state.

This is only the beginning, and ultimately, Hoosier parents and local school officials are the best people to decide how to best keep our students safe. But these new handheld metal detectors will play a key role in the process.
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
|
---
| **_New Mike Braun Ad Hits the Airwaves!_**
U.S. Senate Candidate **Mike Braun** released a new ad this week – Dollar – which showcases Braun's record of creating good-paying American jobs with Democrat Donnelly's record of shipping jobs overseas.

Outsider **Mike Braun** cares about his company and the Hoosiers who work for him. He prides himself on paying his workers nearly double the minimum wage starting out, and he's proud to keep his company's operations right here in America.

**Mike Braun** gets it. He's spent his entire life creating American jobs and hiring American workers. We need to send him to the U.S. Senate.
---
|
---

clean_body: New polling came out this week, and it spells trouble for Democrat Joe Donnelly. That's because we're still months away from Election Day, and yet... | | | | G.O.Party is THIS TUESDAY! Reminder : Governor Eric Holcomb , Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer and our 2018 statewide team are hosting a BIG party at the Lucas Oil Estate this Tuesday. RSVP now, and make sure you don't miss out. Individual: ! Non-Individual (Corporations, PACs, LLPs):! Learn more , and RSVP to Corinne at mailto:CHerndon@indiana.gop | | | | Trouble for Democrat Donnelly New polling came out this week, and it spells trouble for Democrat Joe Donnelly. Our Republican U.S. Senate candidate,Mike Braun , against Democrat Joe Donnelly, leading 49% to 47%. And as a incumbent still months away from Election Day, Democrat Donnelly has to be worried. But polling isn't the only thing that must be worrying Democrat Donnelly these days. That's because this week, President Trump announced a fantastic pick for the U.S. Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh. Judge Kavanaugh is a well-qualified, mainstream nominee. He is a respected legal mind, and his credentials are impeccable. With more than 300 published opinions, Judge Kavanaugh has demonstrated he will apply the law as written and enforce the text, structure, and original understanding of the Constitution. But as you know, that's not good enough for Democrats, who had and ready before they even knew who President Trump would nominate. Their "fill in the blank" outrage was on full display this week. And that means that Democrat Donnelly has a choice to make: He'll either side with Hoosiers and vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh, or he'll side with his Democrat boss Chuck Schumer and vote to obstruct filling our nation's Supreme Court bench. We know where Mike Braun stands. This week he called Judge Kavanaugh an "outstanding" choice. But where does Democrat Donnelly stand? He voted for 99% of Barack Obama's judicial nominees, but he can't tell us where he stands on confirming Judge Kavanaugh. We must keep these poll numbers moving, so that the poll on Election Day shows Mike Braun going to Washington. But in order to make that happen, there's still a lot of work that has to happen along the way. -Kyle Photo: Chairman Kyle Hupfer joins members of the Indiana 8th District GOP Committee this week to provide an update from the Indiana Republican Party, and to encourage them to keep up the great work heading into this November's critical elections. | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Keeping Our Schools Safe This week, Governor Eric Holcomb , which will provide Indiana schools with another resource to help keep students, teachers and staff safe. Handheld metal detectors will now be available at no cost to schools that want them throughout the state, helping schools watch over what comes into their buildings. This new tool comes as Governor Holcomb has made millions of extra dollars available to schools already this year for safety measures, including $35 million in low-interest loans to make school buildings more secure, an additional $5 million to support school safety grants, and $1 million to support a full audit of school safety plans around the state. This is only the beginning, and ultimately, Hoosier parents and local school officials are the best people to decide how to best keep our students safe. But these new handheld metal detectors will play a key role in the process. | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | New Mike Braun Ad Hits the Airwaves! U.S. Senate Candidate Mike Braun released a new ad this week – Dollar – which showcases Braun's record of creating good-paying American jobs with Democrat Donnelly's record of shipping jobs overseas. Outsider Mike Braun cares about his company and the Hoosiers who work for him. He prides himself on paying his workers nearly double the minimum wage starting out, and he's proud to keep his company's operations right here in America. Mike Braun gets it. He's spent his entire life creating American jobs and hiring American workers. We need to send him to the U.S. Senate. | | Upcoming Republican Events : Warren County GOP Golf Outing : Buck Garden Party | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Superintendent Jennifer McCormick Senator Todd Young Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Todd Rokita Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | It's a great time to be a Hoosier!Indiana State Auditor Tera Klutz released the state’s 2018 Fiscal Closeout Report this week, announcing that our state's fiscal reserves remain strong. Indiana is ending the fiscal year in a solid position, ensuring that our state remains the fiscal envy of the nation. Read about it ! | "Read More" | | http:// Between great pro-life news in Fort Wayne and President Trump's Supreme Court nomination, the Fort Wayne News Sentinel was right to report that this has been a great week for conservatives! latest column in the Fort Wayne News Sentinel! | "Read More" | | Vice President Mike Pence spoke to WIBC’s Tony Katz this week to talk about why Judge Brett Kavanaugh is the “most deserving, most qualified choice” for the U.S. Supreme Court! Friend,

Just one month from tomorrow, we’ll reach the biggest milestone of our campaign: the Republican primary.

After winning your support at the state GOP convention and receiving the endorsement of the Republican Party of Wisconsin with a historic percentage, I’m excited to take on radically liberal Senator Baldwin in November.

But I’ve still got to get past the primary. That's why I have to count on you so much right now to make sure we pull off a victory on August 14th.

[**Can you chip in today to help us in these final weeks before the primary?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=AE4_7ukxW4H1jhEjf_DQr8_1j4mIP1aQ0vAXphgA4Q6L5HwFwMQrHAfcXY0HZIJMth2XxNN3WJcd02YnFG1xY1TUzXH7sNK7X-omFwRrDY_KkGiw0PwIjzgRmM5zJblzfGAwRbwIbYpv2kBkxRzzonQiJI89im-bub0Mi-sBJus5uJ2FRYVCAwqRLB4cXMi_oB6hr390kNYJlkwpS2gCxI8yKfvhQ80Ve3NsnqTdCuYlyy5VaYkq_-RExj29c5WWM2e2Cy5XLjHMkJef1RLES6T3YLtpH8cyrvRcugqn-LxAh8u9ur6QNiYFIachmeK7U8x-rA1CkAkUm811tDpfeH80-G4XinPoPX4gID6PGvP287kYTO1ZqPdWum_WNv_l-pn_Mjz0uqx3U7VZoOsbXFIY51nCE5MmopIWk_SiGi0%3D)

First, we have to win this primary. Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=AE4_7ukxW4H1jhEjf_DQr47D7LF8QM_4dAngBSTVOChMFCGcwJ9ZpT9H3_CelTAPQbShhBY3PsYNfz4e3-rMEQv9TjE3AMjDHhiehqnK-RCMwiLP0hbzXybJr80lysD6qh0B8cVdEHoUEn_S0nwL0-Xg0Uk34ElvN97yE6nQGTbbWbuFdKYAqmBZ0mdqUmRkxvSwivPDHG4VE1vq2yoV6Lg4T2i5LsR_kcZ0badjEyctfp_v3Rj5ZAt4MDsY3g86b7rOKeWvWIInr5_h5E-1tkLzpExAD1-SHygWMRM6m1tr1tcuT9NJMNSUT2UqO7rRErAJ3F-olrMe7qhSyTRtvR8YRxFL6NXSumzQjJMfVWyp7LOOoyPUXwhxhUNHMOgR) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=AE4_7ukxW4H1jhEjf_DQr47D7LF8QM_4dAngBSTVOCjrsXVD7rus79OQ77fHCbT_HitWFQY3a6wOrczjSDbjBV76HF01IL0Dqks-vWYgsk0QK71rGiL0sKd5fPn9MRMakF0ccvfklvpFQznmW8eTw9vGQ_mBupjLP0RLZs7DCYCJ1DJnFfVfhYA7jTsI0m-N5iOfX2T_WSuqfiW8qIai9idkDPJGs7o0c5RWe65Hq1ghts6olwRNjv4INKzKev6b2VTWhtmyXGcx_qYJmJM7P_lwsNTpgWGZ8CWg42ZVCzREt7O035nIhxWlgPzAjRdu3LfoUuU3WRwPtuOGDOkjBfOUNoKnnEQAZ7kqFG6RmU-UQrB6xNFZYz5EPAlwgpTN) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=AE4_7ukxW4H1jhEjf_DQr5qMB0ACj_384a1ScAjESZSpAeFxnc3HljsoUFqe6rjJ4BRASJVSSWDGARkJWLtgenEs-9wDO4BgZTcVcTPU05q-VuT8b_-qOB4t-q2c8Aen4AwCPWS4ZOSNav0x_g-08gPKQzNXJwlNCAYn5hzsvJO_dguTVuP7XbGX77kfpAlRqRzZFxEibaI5Ne_eFEhi4OwTQr17-ElktmPtcGNHxuOHzEN-McEROPZ0ZAnpd_4yYKXB__vLfH9Nh7PSQl0fFQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=AE4_7ukxW4H1jhEjf_DQr04q2XkQkUqEmYz9h66hMsVOjJT36vMItyzdzJkVel2agB6P6ipCVd9pqcjqRVN2AwYRtxNQ603sQkiN_ECF-7eS9W3ZGn5LRCX7M-II9xbc5D3a7u5D30Ybiwb6Oub2Gcuj8c9WQDeQXjRV8hNXljgTuw5pUI40069ICMkvFvMhihy2Thdj-I7ryyPFnYyXdXE4G4NCZDDWJxajcaY9gShkQrOtUgV3qb4uUCzln7_wgKnjoqdac0GjXAdKXKOmCQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=AE4_7ukxW4H1jhEjf_DQr49GZUq0424Mo8LGzamlcNePthReVnCnO_OQ_VNA3F3PLjAto_3s7z42Xw_mdzTqUSL8zXGOXSXyhshrIHfa4VIo4hmrvRBRIuQs35Wt-Un3bml6aBLIpp1IsZ5FZMLYqicb1CfYMaagl8syfi3_kDlSdEOZQqixZJdtaFGK553D2VLXviZqQcYdRyftwAGIF6Gu3yFEHQgDF6Pyuz3JmOJdzCIQ996GoCxL8xYZ5Z_YrigLSEzNDHfg8gVtQh9I_g%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=AE4_7ukxW4H1jhEjf_DQr47D7LF8QM_4dAngBSTVOCh7uKwnbOvpNSwP1LrV-fTiA57zSR0olppArhqHan-3zXUvpXroSbH0Ej8f92VpXnF0zpQX6QxuifFq05rUg7iYRKV16-0a9G3iUXH8GL2CQZGCfTt7azLWPxudkag-7Fad4U72Bikxc7N3jJZHkLh7SpATjv2RNqm31DVNbESjDB4KNlpIQZ-OV7p_u2g49mwqGo2XbHNE3nweLV9blBHaAHAEEnEyGuyYtJkcEW6rexBk9hye8ZVxMuZyHL7Dq8WaIu8kGtVPoHFje9tiuR3MjTw5g1EXCtY7gna09ZGHu0DOsvkN05J51g0BIj4e4BQavRwBvN4n-eynhB1Nxs4a8bfvK3fk8ltF6wDHfOiUWw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=F7MKCSDHeSa6D_reZEAiollrbW9IosTUBbjgcrzIunh2f2-RmpBViM6bI3hqpTHRA5GUepiciTSpqecD_p8LL82oaJFpM5QndwA0k5ViWzYcFXeg_LtH12VimCTXLljw_p9uHaXF6RdfMc5iO58fr64q_Voei-n8KQKNoPNuT2y3e7yn2Z-TVcd-uh0Nt-kIsNC4uLhv2KZUFj-KKohlXJ4Ubw768qqT72KkMF-xBPyXa8tnhubfxHGuyNwS5pxv) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1281e056611f4a63ba87511827f162e5&_e=F7MKCSDHeSa6D_reZEAiollrbW9IosTUBbjgcrzIunh2f2-RmpBViM6bI3hqpTHRA5GUepiciTSpqecD_p8LL82oaJFpM5QndwA0k5ViWzYcFXeg_LtH12VimCTXLljw_p9uHaXF6RdfMc5iO58fr64q_Voei-n8KQKNoPNuT2y3e7yn2Z-TVcd-uh0Nt-kIsNC4uLhv2KZUFj-KKohlXJ4Ubw768qqT72KkMF-xBPyXa8tnhubfxHGuyNwS5pxv) to unsubscribe. name: Team Sherrod
subject: Must Read: 13 Frightening Race Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | We wanted to do something a little different Peter. In honor of Friday the 13th, we're giving you **13 frightening race updates** (and reasons you should [**chip in $13**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782ba/2836291311/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?refcode=sbe180713nd_m&amount=13")). _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782b9/2836291311/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEzbmQiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180713nd_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $13](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782b9/2836291311/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEzbmQiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?express_lane=true&amount=13&refcode=sbe180713nd_m_13&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782b9/2836291311/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEzbmQiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180713nd_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782b8/2836291311/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEzbmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?refcode=sbe180713nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
1. A new poll shows **multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci closing the gap in our race.**

2. The Republican National Committee (RNC) is attacking Sherrod.

3. A Super PAC supporting Renacci reportedly engaged in some of the "shadiest" practices ever -- and that's saying a lot.

4. It's not just the special interests coming after Sherrod. Renacci is running TV attack ads, too.

5. President Trump & Vice President Pence have personally come to Ohio to support Renacci.

Sherrod's up against a lot of opposition. Already want to help? [**Pitch in $13 or more to get us to our $337,500 mid month goal before Sunday's deadline.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782ba/2836291311/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?refcode=sbe180713nd_m&amount=13") Ok, the list doesn't stop there: 6\. Renacci **raised $2 million** in the second quarter of the year, and that doesn't include all the self-funding he can do. 7\. Sherrod's been under attack since February of 2017 -- and we have four months of attacks to come. 8\. A new group -- backed by an Ohio businessman who tried to defeat Sherrod in 2012 -- is getting ready to attack Sherrod again. Which isn't great news right now, because... 9\. **We're only 116 DAYS from Election Day.** That's not a whole lot of time to turn things around, and with so much at stake this year, we can't afford to lose Sherrod's voice in the Senate. 10\. [**It's scary you haven't made your first contribution yet. Can you do it now?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782b8/2836291311/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzEzbmQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?refcode=sbe180713nd_m_other&refcode2=3268183") 11\. In a post-Citizens United world, we don't know how much special interest cash will find its way to Ohio. Back in 2012, it was over $40 million. 12\. **Missing goals is scary.** When we miss goals, it means we can't afford all the resources we need to win. Which leads to our last, scariest update of all... 13\. **Our mid month deadline is this Sunday.** Halfway through the month, we should be halfway to our July goal. That means we need to be at $337,500 by Sunday -- and we're not even close to that yet. So if you can, [**rush in a contribution of $13 to help us reach this goal before Sunday.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9d9/4462dc26/55563e03/200782ba/2836291311/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180713nd?refcode=sbe180713nd_m&amount=13") Thanks! Team Sherrod
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Carollo?=
subject: Updates from the Campaign trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
It may be Friday the 13th but our luck couldn't be better...

** It may be Friday the 13th but our luck couldn't be better!
------------------------------------------------------------

I hope you've been having a good week, our team certainly has! Just yesterday we trained 15 great new volunteers who are all ready to start reaching out to voters, in fact, a handful of motivated volunteers turned around and set up a door knock for today! Our campaign is so lucky to have supporters like you, who are doing everything they can to make sure that we are reaching as many voters as possible.

We have a lot going on this weekend and coming up next week, in fact as I write this email Ian is talking to voters at a house party in SD29 sharing his values and what we hope to accomplish in 2018. This Saturday our leadership is doubling down on its commitment to fight harassment and implicit bias in the workplace by attending the DFL training on the subject and sharing notes with the rest of the team. Then on Sunday, we will be at the Monticello parade (https://www.facebook.com/events/471992786555260/?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=daa3b39677-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_13_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-daa3b39677-9291445) at 11 am at the American Legion in Monticello. We also have the Wright and Sherburne County fairs starting next week, so we will be busy driving around literature, T-Shirts, and yard signs to volunteers managing the DFL booths.

The Summer is nearly halfway over and our campaign is in full swing. This is an exciting time to be involved in democracy and we greatly appreciate your support. If you haven't yet, please invite all of your friends to "like" our page on facebook (https://www.facebook.com/Todd4Congress/?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=daa3b39677-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_13_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-daa3b39677-9291445) so that we can reach as many people as possible by the time voting starts on Friday, September 21st!

Contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=13july&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=daa3b39677-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_13_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-daa3b39677-9291445)

https://www.facebook.com/Todd4Congress?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=daa3b39677-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_13_10_27&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-daa3b39677-9291445
